catalyst.event: 2026 H1/Q2 earnings print and accompanying guidance on 1.6T mass production timeline and 800G mix — this is the first observable that resolves the strategic-capacity-build vs pre-build-inventory-risk debate.
catalyst.source: Inferred from normal A-share H1 reporting cadence; exact date not available in our data. Narrative basis: TUSHARE broker reports 西部证券 20260429 '800G/1.6T高速模块持续放量' and 国联民生证券 20260423 '积极备货和布局产能'.

rightIf_conditions: Post H1 2026 print, one side's interpretation of '积极备货和布局产能' is decisively confirmed (margin direction + 1.6T guidance), validating the PASS-then-re-engage decision over a forced trade today.
Stock chops within ¥846–¥918 chip-cluster band over the next 60–90 days while waiting for the catalyst, validating the symmetric-risk read.
Either margin financing unwinds from 99.6% leveraged-long extreme OR insider NET_SELL_HIGH signal reverses before re-engagement.
Analyst mean target meaningfully repriced (>10% revision in either direction) post-H1 print, providing fresh grounding.
wrongIf_conditions: Stock breaks decisively above ¥920 (52W high) on confirmed 1.6T order news before H1 print — would mean PASS missed an asymmetric long.
Stock breaks below ¥846 chip cluster on margin-call cascade before H1 print — would mean PASS missed an asymmetric short entry.
Forensic re-run with new data (broker channel checks, 龙虎榜) provides a clear grounding verdict that PASS overlooked.
what_changes_our_mind: H1 2026 earnings print provides explicit 1.6T revenue contribution guidance for FY2027 AND gross margin holds ≥44% (re-engages LONG); OR gross margin contracts >300bps OR 1.6T delayed past Q3 2026 (re-engages SHORT).
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes the 1.6T cycle thesis is decidable today → We believe the resolving observable is not yet in our data and positioning is symmetrically dangerous → Mechanism is to defer until H1 2026 print provides margin trajectory and 1.6T guidance, then re-engage with conviction rather than gamble on a 50/50 binary at 93% of 52W range with -1.4% mean-target upside.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: 0% to -10% (opportunity cost if stock breaks out before re-engagement)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.reward_to_risk: N/A (PASS — capital preservation, not directional bet)
